Petition For Authority To Distrbute Beneficial Interest Of Vicky Wai Wong To San Francisco Treasurer
Off Calendar Aug-05-2008 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Determine Entitlement To Distribution Of Decedents Estate
Off Calendar Sep-10-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Lillian Ng appearing for the Administrator.
The court found that the petition is appropriate. The Court made changes to the order. The court signed the modified order and allowed Ms. Ng to return if she had any questions regaridng the changes. The Court also indicated that Ms. Vicky Wong is entitled to receive the balance from the prior order. If Ms. Wong cannot be located, the balance should be placed in a seperate account designated for her. The court would like to see a further investigation regarding Ms. Womgs where abouts.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Janet Pond CSR#5292. Bailiff: A. Aguerre. Clerk: Rosie Noguera

Petition To Determine Entitlement To Distribution Of Decedents Estate
Off Calendar Aug-28-2007 Continued To Sep-10-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Entitlement To Distribution Of Decedents Estate
Off Calendar Aug-13-2007 Continued To Aug-28-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (3239 Mission St., No. 6, San Francisco, Ca 94110)
Off Calendar Mar-14-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng (Counsel for Andrea Leung, Personal Representative).

After Ms. Ng announced the sale and its terms and receiving no overbids, the Court confirmed the sale of the real property at $425,000.00 with additional bond set at $270,000.00 (signing the Order for same in open court).

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR# 11722; Bailiff: Deputy Teresa Fox; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Christine Nahnsen.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-03-2006 Granted Per Written Order
